query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(p.id) as product_count 
FROM categories c 
LEFT JOIN subcategories s ON s.categoryId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.subcategoryId = s.id 
GROUP BY c.id, c.name;
command:
